g.text: Execute the file as owner with the owner permission
Does nothing (in most of UNIX system)
Execute the file with the group permission
All next files and subdirectory will inherit the group
Only owner can delete/rename its own file/subdirectory
Does nothing (old usage but removed in 2005 on Solaris for ex)
Note : ⚠ Capital letter for s and t
means that there is no execute permissions
